ddls:
CREATE TABLE "microcontrollers" (
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller model */,
  "mcu_model" TEXT /* Model name of the microcontroller */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the microcontroller */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the microcontroller */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the microcontroller */,
  "architectures_supported" TEXT /* Architectures supported by the microcontroller */,
  "max_clock_speed" REAL /* Maximum clock speed of the microcontroller */,
  "flash_memory" INTEGER /* Flash memory capacity of the microcontroller */,
  "ram" INTEGER /* RAM capacity of the microcontroller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin */,
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the microcontroller model */,
  "pin_number" TEXT /* Pin number (can be a comma-separated list for multiple pins sharing the same configuration) */,
  "pin_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin */,
  "pin_function" TEXT /* Function of the pin (e.g., Input, Output) */,
  "formal_name" TEXT /* Formal name or description of the pin */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Detailed definition of the pin's function */,
  "voltage_rating" REAL /* Voltage rating of the pin */,
  "current_rating" REAL /* Current rating of the pin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pins_mcu_id FOREIGN KEY ("mcu_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin configuration */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pin being configured */,
  "config_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "configuration_data" TEXT /* Configuration data in JSON or other structured format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hardware engineer, firmware developer, project manager) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES pin_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pin configuration */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* Configuration data in JSON or other structured format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES pin_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin map */,
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the microcontroller model */,
  "map_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the pin map */,
  "map_data" TEXT /* Pin map data in JSON or other structured format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pin map was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pin map was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the pin map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_maps_mcu_id FOREIGN KEY ("mcu_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_map_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pin map */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the pin map */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* Pin map data in JSON or other structured format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_map_versions_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES pin_maps ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_map_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pin */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., voltage, current, pull-up) */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement or constraint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the requirement was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_requirements_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pin configuration */,
  "simulation_data" TEXT /* Simulation data in JSON or other structured format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_simulations_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES pin_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pin configuration */,
  "test_data" TEXT /* Test data in JSON or other structured format */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_tests_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES pin_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_tests_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pin configuration */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., datasheet, user manual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was uploaded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the uploader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_documents_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES pin_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id")
)
